warnings: REP remains the canonical replay authority. This record reports observations only.
Non-material divergences (timestamps, record IDs) are excluded by construction.
failure_prevented: Material divergence in MET outputs hiding under timestamp-only differences and never reaching REP for replay analysis.
signal_improved: Material divergences are reported with affected_systems and a next_recommended_input to feed REP.

divergence_entries.failure_prevented: Silent material divergence between MET runs.
divergence_entries.signal_improved: No-divergence state is explicit per fingerprint.
divergence_entries.next_recommended_input: Continue paired-run capture; no action required.

divergence_entries.failure_prevented: Single-run divergence state being substituted with 0 or false instead of unknown.
divergence_entries.signal_improved: Single-run state remains visibly unknown until a paired run is captured.
divergence_entries.next_recommended_input: Capture a second run to enable divergence detection.
